description: Redox is a healthcare interoperability platform that helps organizations exchange, normalize, and route clinical and administrative data between healthcare systems and cloud environments. It supports integration workflows for providers, payers, vendors, EHRs, and related healthcare data use cases.
summary: Redox exposes three authenticated HTTP APIs—Data Model API, FHIR API, and Platform API—plus an MCP server endpoint; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
